description: Intent-only request: classify a support agent with explicitly reusable actions as agent-anchored with workflow tools.

conversation.text: Customer support agent that can look up orders from Postgres, issue refunds via our billing service, and escalate to a Zendesk ticket. The lookup, refund, and escalation should be reusable workflows we can also trigger manually elsewhere.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the support agent owns the top-level control flow, while the lookup, refund, and escalation actions are explicitly first-class reusable workflows invoked as tools of the agent.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
